examples: In Group F , Galatasaray stayed on top on seven points with a 4-1 victory at home to Dinamo Bucuresti.
Former European champions Steaua Bucuresti were held 0-0 at home by Moldovan newcomers FC Sheriff in a match played behind closed doors.
Romanian side Dinamo Bucuresti won 1-0 away to Austria's Sturm Graz as defender Gabriel Tamas netted the only goal with 10 minutes to play.
